assessor_raw: IT support semantic retrieval: methodologically sound. Temporal split mirrors deployment for evolving ticket language. Expert label audit validates label quality. Both models receive equal tuning with same primary metric. Recall@10 is appropriate for multi-label retrieval. Stratification by article popularity and product area enables confound detection. Metadata ablation and vocabulary drift check address key alternative explanations. Bootstrap CIs with equal confidence level. Test set touched once. Verdict: defense_wins.
